title: Mystical Stuff
description: A mod that adds cool new things to minecraft, like titanium tools, armor, new magical additions to the game and much more coming soon!!!
body:
This is a cool mod that adds many new things to minecraft, like titanium tools, armor, new magical additions and more!!! Also it will be frequently updated to newer or older version of minecraft and there will be updates that add many new things to the game !!!

This is our first mod so if you find some serious or frequent bugs let us know and we will try to fix them in future updates. 

- 

(We lost our mod workspace for mystical stuff ... we are sorry but we will try to recover it in the future ... for now we will try to make more creative , beautiful and generally better mods for minecraft - if you have an idea of a mod post it in suggestions or in general chat of our discord server .This means that the mod will probably not have bug fix updates (we will be more carefull with our next mods so this doesn't happen again)

Also you can join our community server here -->https://discord.gg/j4mqEnPQ


Enjoy!!!:-)
